form.formComment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Forward showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but he has solid credentials over this track and distance. Forward showing expected.

form.formComment: Last start finished seventh over 525m at The Meadows, beaten 18 lengths (31.35) behind Shade Of Pale in a Grade 5 on April 1. Will find this a little easier. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished seventh over 525m at The Meadows, beaten 18 lengths (31.35) behind Shade Of Pale in a Grade 5 on April 1. Will find this a little easier. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 4.5 lengths at Shepparton over 450m (25.78) beating Soda Ben in Grade 5 on April 10. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance after tracking the speed to win by 4.5 lengths at Shepparton over 450m (25.78) beating Soda Ben in Grade 5 on April 10. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Turned head outwards on home turn.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 450m at Ballarat in a handy (25.63), beating Stitch And Shout. Will find this a bit tougher, happy to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 450m at Ballarat in a handy (25.63), beating Stitch And Shout. Will find this a bit tougher, happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Placed only run here over this trip. Latest effort finished 5th on April 13 over 515m at Sandown behind She's Saintly beaten 3.5 lengths (30.05) in a Grade 5. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed only run here over this trip. Latest effort finished 5th on April 13 over 515m at Sandown behind She's Saintly beaten 3.5 lengths (30.05) in a Grade 5. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

form.formComment: Ran a better race when third behind Taste That at Healesville last start over 300m (16.91). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ran a better race when third behind Taste That at Healesville last start over 300m (16.91). Good beginner who shouldn't be far away in the run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced wide entering home straight.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (35.40) when fifth over 600m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (35.40) when fifth over 600m at The Meadows in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and four places from seven starts. Suited here and expected to run well.

form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but finished in the minors two back when second (30.47) over 525m at The Meadows. Has a solid record from out wide and is among the better hopes.
